sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108163" key="u(pobu/qios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποβῠ´θ-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">βυθός</etym>) <sense id="n108163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">under the depths,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑπόβρυχα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Erot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
